You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A person in a red shirt and blue jeans travels right on jumping stilts, starting near curved steps and moving across a paved path toward a grassy area with tall white apartment buildings in the background. [4-8] The individual bounces further away across the walkway intersection, approaching parked vehicles and trees at the park's edge before executing a high jump. [8-12] After landing, the figure moves leftward in the distance near the street. The view then shifts to a wide shot of a large, angular white building, showing the person in red walking near the entrance steps in the background. [12-16] A person in a red shirt and blue jeans moves right on jumping stilts across a paved plaza in front of a large, angular white building. The camera pans right, tracking them towards green trees and a light pole. [16-20] The individual executes a high jump, soaring above the walkway against a backdrop of tall pine trees and white apartments. After landing, they stabilize and bounce along a winding path. [20-24] Continuing right, the person crouches low and rises on the stilts. Background pedestrians walk near parked white SUVs and tall residential buildings. [24-26] The scene shifts to

[120-124] A person in a blue shirt and jeans balances on jumping stilts on a paved path, arms extended horizontally. Large green trees, parked cars, and a white building line the background. [124-128] The individual executes a high straddle jump with legs spread wide mid-air, then lands on the path, bringing legs together and lowering arms. [128-130] The person bounds across a grassy lawn towards a playground with a blue slide and climbing structure under large trees.

[130-132] A person in a blue shirt and jeans on jumping stilts leaps over a light-colored stone block on the grass, raising one arm, with large trees and playground equipment in the background.
[132-136] The scene shifts to a paved path near a dark arched bridge where a person in a yellow shirt and jeans on jumping stilts bounces and leaps high with bent knees. A pedestrian in a blue jacket walks on the grass to the right.
[136-140] The person in the yellow shirt lands near a large tree and stabilizes with arms extended. The pedestrian in the blue jacket and black pants walks nearby on the path, with green trees and a white wall visible.
[140-144] The person in the yellow shirt, wearing black protective pads on elbows, knees, and wrists and a shirt with a "BRAINIAC" skull logo, walks forward on the stilts towards the camera. An individual in dark clothing with white stripes stands on the far right.

[144-148] A person wearing a yellow t-shirt with a "BRAINIAC" skull logo, blue jeans, and black protective pads on elbows, knees, and wrists walks forward on jumping stilts towards the camera, with trees and a white wall in the background. [148-152] The scene shows them approaching from a distance on a paved path marked with white dashed lines, bouncing forward near a grassy slope and a bridge structure with stairs where several pedestrians stand. [152-154] They perform a dynamic jump, kicking one leg high into the air with the knee bent while raising both arms for balance. [154-156] Upon landing, the individual turns to face right and moves away from the camera along the paved path, passing the bridge structure.

[156-160] A person in a yellow shirt and blue jeans on jumping stilts travels right along a paved path near a dark bridge structure. The environmental lighting drops drastically, casting the scene into near darkness as the individual bounds toward the right edge of the frame. [160-166] The scene cuts to a bright setting where a person in a red shirt, blue jeans, and black protective knee and elbow pads bounces on jumping stilts towards the camera along a multi-colored paved path. A chain-link fence lines the left, casting long shadows, while green grass and distant white city buildings appear under a clear blue sky. The individual passes a green lamp post while maintaining an upright posture.

queries.question: What action is the person wearing a red shirt performing in the grassy park area?

samples.output: <think>A person wearing a red shirt and blue jeans on jumping stilts continues traveling away from the camera along a paved path, flanked by green hedges on the left and a dry grassy field on the right, heading toward distant white fences and trees under a clear sky.</think><action>silent</action>
